method: For each D in the requested date list where archive[D] and archive[D-7] both exist, compare archive[D].per_ticker[ticker].yfinance.fields.eps_trend.records[period]['7daysAgo'] (the lookback side) against archive[D-7]...records[period]['current'] (the actual side). relative_deviation = (lookback - actual) / actual. This script issues no pass/fail verdict.

30d.reason: archive[D-30] must exist; archive coverage starts at 2026-07-12, so the earliest D with both sides present is 2026-07-12 + 30 days = 2026-08-11.

60d.reason: archive[D-60] must exist; archive coverage starts at 2026-07-12, so the earliest D with both sides present is 2026-07-12 + 60 days = 2026-09-10.

90d.reason: archive[D-90] must exist; archive coverage starts at 2026-07-12, so the earliest D with both sides present is 2026-07-12 + 90 days = 2026-10-10.
